control_desc:
WHAT & WHY: This is monthly detective control, to ensure that all failed Idocs have been resolved by WD+1, otherwise the impact assessment of unresolved Idocs, in scope, is completed with follow up actions addressed and communicated to AZ AP Sr. Manager for review if any further action recommended.

HOW:
On WD+1, the P2P Senior Analyst reviews SAP transaction "SBWP>>Inbox>>workflow>>Group according to Task>>Invoice Input error FI" to verify if all IDoc files have been resolved, released from queue and based on that confirms on results to Finance Master Data team. In case of any unresolved failed Idocs (in scope) by WD+1, Genpact will complete impact assessment template, address & document follow-ups with business user and will share with AZ AP Sr. Manager for review if there are further actions recommended, if any.

WHEN:
Monthly
